basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Officer and Counsellor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Medical Officer and Counsellor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Medical Officer and Counsellor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years for all posts. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, Master Degree in Social Work (preferably specialized in medical & psychiatric social work/Psychology) OR Masters in Sociology
qualification.details: Medical Officer: Essentially be an MBBS. Counsellor: Master Degree in Social Work (preferably specialized in medical & psychiatric social work/Psychology) OR Masters in Sociology may be considered. Qualified and competent PLHIV will be given preference.

salary_details.details: Medical Officer: Rs. 72000/- PM (to be revised as per existing NACO rule) Counsellor: Rs. 21000/- PM (to be revised as per existing NACO rule)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Delhi Medical Officer and Counsellor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the AIIMS Delhi Medical Officer and Counsellor posts is 08-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Medical Officer and Counsellor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Medical Officer and Counsellor positions at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The essential educational qualification for the Medical Officer post is an MBBS degree.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: For the Counsellor post, candidates need a Master Degree in Social Work (preferably specialized in medical & psychiatric social work/Psychology) or a Masters in Sociology.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Medical Officer and Counsellor posts is 30 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer and Counsellor posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 72000/- PM for Medical Officer and Rs. 21000/- PM for Counsellor, which are subject to revision as per existing NACO rules.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application process for these positions is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q9. When is the interview scheduled for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The interview for the shortlisted candidates is scheduled to be held on 12-06-2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
